contentBlocks.text: If you’d like have a chat with us, or would like to have a look round the gym, please get in touch.
contentBlocks.html: Find Us Located in the heart of Shoreditch, The Vault Gym is easily accessible from Old Street, Liverpool Street and Shoreditch High Street stations. Lower Ground Floor Zetland House 5-25 Scrutton Street London EC2A 4 HJ Tel: 020 7247 1111 Jon@thevaultgym.com Suzy@thevaultgym.com

seo.title: Contact The Vault Private Gym | Luxury Personal Training Gym in Shoreditch, London
seo.description: Looking for a premium private gym in Central London? The Vault Gym in Shoreditch offers exclusive personal training, just minutes from Old Street, Moorgate and Liverpool Street stations. Contact us today.
